desc: FCP ProCore PCEstimateGamma(CGColorSpace*) results via dlsym — authoritative working-space gamma.
finding: FCP Rec.709 (ITU-R BT.709) working space has gamma 1.961 (NOT sRGB 2.2, NOT scene-linear 1.0). This authoritatively confirms the gamma-1.958 working space decoded for Tint/HSV/Colorize/Levels is FCP real Rec.709 gamma. Empirical best-fit 1.956 = effective power over the tested code range; nominal FCP value 1.961. Working colour space = Rec.709 primaries + 1.961 gamma + Rec.709 luma.
